nasb.text: Do nothing from selfishness or empty conceit, but with humility of mind regard one another as more important than yourselves;

esv.text: Do nothing from selfish ambition or conceit, but in humility count others more significant than yourselves.

cnv.text: 不要自私自利，也不要貪圖虛榮，只要謙卑，看別人比自己強；

ccb.text: 凡事不可自私自利、爱慕虚荣，要心存谦卑，看别人比自己强。

csbs.text: 做任何事都不要出于争竞，也不可出于虚荣，而要以谦卑的心，各人看别人比自己强；
